context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements content-commerce UTM attribution: the right UTM parameter names and values for content-driven product links, order attribution storage with all required fields, priority hierarchy for multi-channel attribution, and a SQL query that filters for content source attribution.

checklist.name: utm_source = 'content'
checklist.description: The product URL builder sets utm_source to exactly 'content' (not 'blog', 'article', or another value)

checklist.name: utm_medium = 'article'
checklist.description: The product URL builder sets utm_medium to exactly 'article'

checklist.name: utm_campaign = article slug
checklist.description: The utm_campaign parameter is set to the article's slug (not the article ID, title, or a category)

checklist.name: utm_content = product slug
checklist.description: The utm_content parameter is set to the product's slug (not the product ID, name, or 'product')

checklist.name: Order attribution fields
checklist.description: The captureOrderAttribution function stores all four UTM-derived fields: source, medium, campaign, and content (alongside orderId)

checklist.name: Attribution priority hierarchy
checklist.description: The code or comments document that paid search takes priority over email, email over content, and content over organic (paid search > email > content > organic)

checklist.name: SQL WHERE source = 'content'
checklist.description: The SQL report filters on 'source = content' (or 'utm_source = content') to restrict results to content-driven orders

checklist.name: SQL includes revenue aggregation
checklist.description: The SQL query contains a SUM expression for revenue and a COUNT for orders

checklist.name: SQL groups by article slug
checklist.description: The SQL query groups results by the campaign column (article slug) and orders/sorts by revenue

checklist.name: SQL time filter
checklist.description: The SQL query includes a date filter limiting results to approximately the last 90 days

checklist.name: URL uses STORE_URL base
checklist.description: The product URL is constructed with a configurable base URL (environment variable, constant, or parameter) rather than being hardcoded to a specific domain
